case_title: HAROLD ANTHONY ZIGLER VS. KBR ENTERPRISES INC DBA SHOE WIZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY ZIGLER, HAROLD ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT KBR ENTERPRISES INC DBA SHOE WIZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HAROLD ANTHONY ZIGLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KBR ENTERPRISIS INC DBA SHOE WIZ IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KEVORK SHIRIKIAN OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO HAROLD ANTHONY ZIGLER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIGLER, HAROLD ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KBR ENTERPRISES INC DBA SHOE WIZ PLAINTIFF PAID DEFENDANT $45 TO REPAIR SHOES. DEFENDANT REPAIRED SHOES. PLAINTIFF CLAIMS SHOES WERE NOT PROPERLY REPAIRED. COURT DISAGREES, FINDS NO EVIDENCE THAT SHOES WERE NOT PROPERLY REPAIRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIGLER, HAROLD ANTHONY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT KBR ENTERPRISES INC DBA SHOE WIZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2020 - JUDGMENT.
